public_api_contract: applyEvent(state, event): State; getPaycheck(state): Paycheck; getYearToDate(state): YearToDate. Both conditions receive this concrete event API and the same worked examples; only feedback_capable_spec receives runnable feedback assets. Event types, each with a unique string id unless it is intentionally duplicated to test idempotency: pay_period_started {id, type:'pay_period_started', periodIndex, gross, periodsPerYear, filingStatus:'single'|'joint', allowances}; pre_tax_deduction_set {id, type:'pre_tax_deduction_set', code, amount}; post_tax_deduction_set {id, type:'post_tax_deduction_set', code, amount}; benefit_elected {id, type:'benefit_elected', code, amount}; bonus_paid {id, type:'bonus_paid', bonusId, amount}; bonus_voided {id, type:'bonus_voided', bonusId}; prior_ytd_set {id, type:'prior_ytd_set', gross, socialishWages, medicareishWages}; garnishment_order_set {id, type:'garnishment_order_set', orderId, priority, amount, percentCap}; additional_withholding_set {id, type:'additional_withholding_set', amount}. getPaycheck returns {gross, regularGross, bonusGross, preTaxTotal, taxableBaseFederal, taxableBaseState, withholding:{federalish, stateish, socialish, medicareish, additional}, creditTotal, postTaxTotal, garnishmentTotal, net, lineItems:[{code, amount}]}. getYearToDate returns {gross, socialishWages, medicareishWages, socialishTax, medicareishTax}.
